untranslatable_reason: The pattern requires detecting 'twelve consecutive candlesticks with new price lines (higher highs)', which necessitates lookback logic to count consecutive bars meeting a condition. The available indicator set does not include a consecutive bar counter or pattern detection mechanism. The schema only supports single-bar comparisons and does not allow indexing like close[1..12] or bar-counting functions. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern detector or loop logic not expressible in this 3-field condition format.
translation_notes: Attempted simplified translation using single higher-high condition, but this does not capture the core requirement of TWELVE CONSECUTIVE higher highs. The source text references '8 or 10 new price lines' suggesting this is a multi-bar confirmation pattern. Parameters like success_rate_bull (51%), success_rate_bear (61%), and average_rise_pct are author-silent and cannot be used. Entry/exit conditions would require bar-counting logic unavailable in the allowed operator set.
